summary: Regression + crash-resilience testing for Vercel deploy fix (n.map error). All defense-in-depth guards verified: BlogSection/Blog/AdminDashboard survive non-array API responses. Backend 18/18 pytest pass, frontend build clean, vercel.json regex verified for /api exclusion, DEPLOY.md carries root-directory warning.
critical_code_review_comments: All fixes are correct defense-in-depth. Root cause of the Vercel bug (Root Directory not set to frontend/) is a deployment-config issue that must be resolved in Vercel dashboard — code cannot fix it, only prevent the crash. DEPLOY.md Step 4 already flags this loudly.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded blog posts + admin.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Playwright route mocking used to inject non-array responses into /api/blog (HTML string, 404 JSON) and /api/admin/enquiries + /api/admin/stats (object, string). BlogSection returns null gracefully; Blog page shows 'No posts yet' empty state; AdminDashboard shows zero stats + empty enquiries. No pageerror emitted in any scenario. vercel.json regex '^/((?!api/|api$|_next/|.*\..*|admin/api).*)$' verified against 9 URL patterns — /api, /api/, /api/blog, /api/admin/enquiries all NOT rewritten; /admin/login, /blog/<slug>, / are REWRITTEN; /robots.txt, /sitemap.xml NOT rewritten.
